summary: Two parallel role reviews (frontend + backend). Backend review: LGTM — get_device_info correct, cargo check clean, no regressions. Frontend review: initially ITERATE (2 critical + 5 warning). R1 fixes landed inline on build run_2: Tauri window config (1280×800 + min 1280×760 + decorations:false + Overlay titlebar + hiddenTitle + dragDropEnabled), HiDPI drop math (getCurrentWindow().scaleFactor()), unread badge wiring (readAtByContact + markRead + countUnread), FileBubble cancel + download (local-only cancelTransfer, toast surfaces local_path), message-sent handler appends on unknown id, console.warn gated behind import.meta.env.DEV, orphan typing-bounce keyframe removed. Verdict flipped to PASS — criticals cleared; pnpm lint + 43 tests + cargo check all green.
